abstract.t:
This document offers guidance for developing privacy considerations for inclusion in IETF documents. It aims to make protocol designers aware of privacy-related design choices. It suggests that whether any individual RFC requires a specific privacy considerations section will depend on the document's content.
Discussion of this document is taking place on the IETF Privacy Discussion mailing list (see https://www.ietf.org/mailman/listinfo/ietf-privacy).
